top_signals.title: Fed Governor Bowman Spoke at Private Dinner After Policy Meeting
top_signals.summary: Michelle Bowman, the Federal Reserve’s vice chair for supervision, spoke at a private dinner in New York hours after attending the central bank’s policy meeting, the Wall Street Journal reported, a period when officials are restricted from commenting on monetary policy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO Sparks Anticipation for OpenAI and Anthropic
top_signals.summary: The capital influx from the SpaceX IPO, which ended its first week of trading up 37% from its IPO price, highlights strong investor enthusiasm. Bloomberg Radio host of "Masters in Business" Barry Ritholtz comes on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the potential impact of this enthusiasm on the upcoming IPOs of OpenAI and Anthropic, expected to go public in the near future. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
